I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me reason through each fix:

### Fix 1 - ClipboardCopy (Line 24)
The `ClipboardCopy` component's `children` prop type changed from `React.ReactNode` to `string | string[]`. Looking at line 116-118, the children is `{urlDetails.current.url}` which is a string (or null), so the usage is already compatible. The import is fine. The signature change (`Omit<..., 'onChange'>` → `Omit<..., 'onChange' | 'children'>`) is just a type-level change. No code change needed for the JSX usage. The import is already present.

### Fix 2 - Modal Migration (Line 187)
This is a major change:
1. `title` prop → moves to `<ModalHeader title={...} />`
2. `description` prop → moves to `<ModalHeader description={...} />`  
3. `actions` prop → moves to `<ModalFooter>`
4. All children of `<Modal>` need to be wrapped in `<ModalBody>`
5. Need to add imports: `ModalBody`, `ModalHeader`, `ModalFooter`

### Fix 3 & 5 - CSS class `pf-v5-u-text-align-right` (Line 112)
Both fixes target the same line. The class `pf-v5-u-text-align-right` is removed with no v6 equivalent. Replace with inline style `style={{ textAlign: 'right' }}`.

### Fix 4 - HelperTextItem icon (Line 98)
Looking at lines 97-100, the `HelperTextItem` has text children `{t('Validity period of the presigned URL.')}` but no icon. This is just text content, no icon to move. The rule says to move icon children to the `icon` prop, but there's no icon here. No change needed.

Let me now write the fixed file:

  Modal,
  ModalBody,
  ModalHeader,
  ModalFooter,
  ModalVariant,

  AlertVariant,

  FormHelperText,
  HelperText,
  HelperTextItem,
  ValidatedOptions,
  NumberInput,
  ClipboardCopy,
} from '@patternfly/react-core';
arguments.before:

content.text: Now let me verify the final file looks correct:

The file looks correct. Let me verify all changes are properly applied:

1. **Fix 1 (ClipboardCopy)**: Lines 13-15 — `ModalBody`, `ModalHeader`, `ModalFooter` imports added (ClipboardCopy was already imported). The `children` type change from `ReactNode` to `string | string[]` is a type-level concern — the usage at line 120 passes `{urlDetails.current.url}` which is a string, so it's compatible. No JSX change needed.

2. **Fix 2 (Modal)**: Lines 189-247 — Complete Modal restructuring:
   - `title` and `description` props moved from `<Modal>` to `<ModalHeader>` (lines 195-202)
   - All children wrapped in `<ModalBody>` (lines 203-225)
   - `actions` prop content moved to `<ModalFooter>` (lines 226-246), unwrapped from the array literal
   - Imports added at lines 13-15

3. **Fix 3 & 5 (CSS class)**: Line 115 — `pf-v5-u-text-align-right` removed from className and replaced with `style={{ textAlign: 'right' }}`.

4. **Fix 4 (HelperTextItem icon)**: Lines 101-103 — No change needed. The `HelperTextItem` at this location contains only text (`{t('Validity period of the presigned URL.')}`), no icon element. The rule only applies when icon content is present as children.

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Details |
|-----|------|--------|---------|
| Fix 1 | `family:ClipboardCopy` — signature change | **Applied (import only)** | Added `ModalBody`, `ModalHeader`, `ModalFooter` imports (needed by Fix 2). ClipboardCopy usage already passes a string child, compatible with the new `string \| string[]` type. No JSX change needed. |
| Fix 2 | `family:Modal` — v6 migration | **Applied** | Removed `title`, `description`, `actions` props from `<Modal>`. Added `<ModalHeader>` with `title` and `description` props. Wrapped all children in `<ModalBody>`. Moved `actions` content into `<ModalFooter>` (unwrapped from array literal). |
| Fix 3 | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-u-text-align-right` | **Applied** | Removed `pf-v5-u-text-align-right` from className, replaced with `style={{ textAlign: 'right' }}` inline style. |
| Fix 4 | `sd-icon-children-to-prop-helpertextitem` | **No change needed** | The `HelperTextItem` at line 98 contains only text children (`{t('Validity period...')}`), no icon element. The rule only applies when an icon from `@patternfly/react-icons` is present as a child. |
| Fix 5 | `semver-css-class-removed-u-text-align-right` | **Applied (same as Fix 3)** | Both Fix 3 and Fix 5 target the same `pf-v5-u-text-align-right` class on the same line. Resolved together. |

The file looks correct. Let me verify all changes are properly applied:

1. **Fix 1 (ClipboardCopy)**: Lines 13-15 — `ModalBody`, `ModalHeader`, `ModalFooter` imports added (ClipboardCopy was already imported). The `children` type change from `ReactNode` to `string | string[]` is a type-level concern — the usage at line 120 passes `{urlDetails.current.url}` which is a string, so it's compatible. No JSX change needed.

2. **Fix 2 (Modal)**: Lines 189-247 — Complete Modal restructuring:
   - `title` and `description` props moved from `<Modal>` to `<ModalHeader>` (lines 195-202)
   - All children wrapped in `<ModalBody>` (lines 203-225)
   - `actions` prop content moved to `<ModalFooter>` (lines 226-246), unwrapped from the array literal
   - Imports added at lines 13-15

3. **Fix 3 & 5 (CSS class)**: Line 115 — `pf-v5-u-text-align-right` removed from className and replaced with `style={{ textAlign: 'right' }}`.

4. **Fix 4 (HelperTextItem icon)**: Lines 101-103 — No change needed. The `HelperTextItem` at this location contains only text (`{t('Validity period of the presigned URL.')}`), no icon element. The rule only applies when icon content is present as children.

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Details |
|-----|------|--------|---------|
| Fix 1 | `family:ClipboardCopy` — signature change | **Applied (import only)** | Added `ModalBody`, `ModalHeader`, `ModalFooter` imports (needed by Fix 2). ClipboardCopy usage already passes a string child, compatible with the new `string \| string[]` type. No JSX change needed. |
| Fix 2 | `family:Modal` — v6 migration | **Applied** | Removed `title`, `description`, `actions` props from `<Modal>`. Added `<ModalHeader>` with `title` and `description` props. Wrapped all children in `<ModalBody>`. Moved `actions` content into `<ModalFooter>` (unwrapped from array literal). |
| Fix 3 | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-u-text-align-right` | **Applied** | Removed `pf-v5-u-text-align-right` from className, replaced with `style={{ textAlign: 'right' }}` inline style. |
| Fix 4 | `sd-icon-children-to-prop-helpertextitem` | **No change needed** | The `HelperTextItem` at line 98 contains only text children (`{t('Validity period...')}`), no icon element. The rule only applies when an icon from `@patternfly/react-icons` is present as a child. |
| Fix 5 | `semver-css-class-removed-u-text-align-right` | **Applied (same as Fix 3)** | Both Fix 3 and Fix 5 target the same `pf-v5-u-text-align-right` class on the same line. Resolved together. |
